---
title: "Overview"
description: |
  All blog posts, sorted by publication date (newest first).
site: distill::distill_website
listing: posts
---

```{=html}
<header class="overview-topbar" role="banner" aria-label="Site header">
  <div class="overview-topbar__sidebar">
    <a href="index.html" class="overview-topbar__title">HDAT9800 Blog</a>
  </div>
  <div class="overview-topbar__bar" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="overview-topbar__search">
    <button type="button" class="overview-search-toggle" aria-label="Open search" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="overview-search-panel">
      <svg class="overview-search-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true">
        <circle cx="10.5" cy="10.5" r="6.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"></circle>
        <line x1="15.5" y1="15.5" x2="21" y2="21" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"></line>
      </svg>
    </button>
    <div id="overview-search-panel" class="overview-search-panel"></div>
  </div>
  <a href="about.html" class="overview-topbar__about">About Me</a>
</header>
```

All blog posts are listed below, with the most recent at the top.

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  if (!document.body.classList.contains("layout-listing")) return;

  function setupOverviewTopbar() {
    var topbar = document.querySelector(".overview-topbar");
    if (topbar && topbar.parentElement && topbar.parentElement !== document.body) {
      document.body.insertBefore(topbar, document.body.firstChild);
    }

    var searchEl = document.getElementById("distill-search");
    var panel = document.getElementById("overview-search-panel");
    var toggle = document.querySelector(".overview-search-toggle");
    if (searchEl && panel && !panel.contains(searchEl)) {
      searchEl.classList.remove("hidden");
      searchEl.classList.add("overview-search-input");
      searchEl.setAttribute("placeholder", "Search...");
      panel.appendChild(searchEl);
    }

    if (toggle && panel && !toggle.dataset.bound) {
      toggle.dataset.bound = "1";
      toggle.addEventListener("click", function () {
        var open = panel.classList.toggle("is-open");
        toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", open ? "true" : "false");
        toggle.setAttribute("aria-label", open ? "Close search" : "Open search");
        if (open && searchEl) searchEl.focus();
      });
      document.addEventListener("click", function (ev) {
        if (!panel.classList.contains("is-open")) return;
        if (ev.target.closest(".overview-topbar__search")) return;
        panel.classList.remove("is-open");
        toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
        toggle.setAttribute("aria-label", "Open search");
      });
    }
  }

  var listingBadges = [
    { match: "2026-06-05-test", img: "posts/2026-06-05-test/title-badge.png" },
    { match: "2026-06-08-ggplot-hourglass-four-skill-fusion", img: "posts/2026-06-08-ggplot-hourglass-four-skill-fusion/title-badge.png" }
  ];

  function injectListingBadges() {
    listingBadges.forEach(function (cfg) {
      var card = document.querySelector('a.post-preview[href*="' + cfg.match + '"]');
      if (!card || card.querySelector(".post-card-badge-slot")) return;
      var slot = document.createElement("span");
      slot.className = "post-card-badge-slot";
      slot.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      var img = document.createElement("img");
      img.src = cfg.img;
      img.alt = "";
      slot.appendChild(img);
      card.appendChild(slot);
    });
  }

  function schedule() {
    setupOverviewTopbar();
    injectListingBadges();
    setTimeout(function () {
      setupOverviewTopbar();
      injectListingBadges();
    }, 100);
    setTimeout(function () {
      setupOverviewTopbar();
      injectListingBadges();
    }, 500);
  }

  setupOverviewTopbar();
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", schedule);
  window.addEventListener("WebComponentsReady", schedule);
  window.addEventListener("load", schedule);
})();
</script>
```
